title: Flow Field Painter
description: Paint with particle rivers guided by 5 noise algorithms — Perlin FBM, curl, turbulence, sine, and radial spiral.
concept: A flow field painter that drives thousands of particles along vector fields computed from classic noise algorithms. Switch between Perlin FBM, divergence-free curl noise, sine-wave interference, a radial spiral, and dual-noise turbulence. Four brush modes (flow, attract, repel, erase) let you sculpt the piece interactively. Export full-resolution PNG or share your exact settings via a URL hash.
features: 5 flow algorithms: Perlin FBM, Curl Noise, Sine Wave, Radial Spiral, Turbulence
4 brush modes: flow inject, attract, repel, erase
8 curated color palettes (neon, sunset, ocean, fire, aurora, forest, mono, pastel)
Sliders: particle count (50–3000), speed, trail length, noise scale, line width
Keyboard shortcuts: Space=clear, S=export, F=field, R=seed, 1–5=algo

interaction.mouse: Move to reveal flow field sample point
interaction.click: Inject burst of particles at cursor (flow mode) or apply brush force
interaction.drag: Continuously inject/attract/repel particles along drag path
interaction.touch: Full touch support via Pointer Events API
interaction.keyboard: Space=clear, S=export PNG, F=toggle field, R=new seed, 1-5=algorithm
